    // TODO: Перенести в скрипты
    (function () {
      const isInitialized = {
        mobile: false,
        desktop: false,
      };

      function insertDesktopCustomEcpPfSubMenu() {
        if (isInitialized.desktop) return;
        if (window.innerWidth < 1235) return;

        const el = document.querySelector('#menu-item-3311');
        const ecp = document.querySelector('.main_menu__ecp_pf');

        if (!el || !ecp) return;

        const makeVisible = () => ecp.classList.add('__ecp_pf__visible');
        const removeVisible = () => ecp.classList.remove('__ecp_pf__visible');

        el.querySelector('ul.sub-menu')?.remove();
        el.classList.add('menu-item-has-custom-children');

        el.addEventListener('mouseenter', makeVisible);
        el.addEventListener('mouseleave', removeVisible);

        ecp.addEventListener('mouseenter', makeVisible);
        ecp.addEventListener('mouseleave', removeVisible);

        isInitialized.desktop = true;
      }

      function replaceTabletCustomEcpOfSubMenu() {
        if (isInitialized.mobile) return;
        if (window.innerWidth >= 1235) return;

        const ecp_pf = (() => {
          try {
            return JSON.parse(document.getElementById('ecp-pf-submenu-data')?.textContent || 'null');
          } catch (e) {
            return null;
          }
        })();

        if (!ecp_pf) return;

        const listClass = '.main_menu__mobile__nav__list';
        const linkItem = document.querySelector(`${listClass} .menu-item-${ecp_pf?.page_id}`);
        const subMenu = linkItem?.querySelector('ul.sub-menu');

        if (!linkItem || !subMenu) return;

        subMenu.classList.remove('sub-menu');
        subMenu.classList.add('ecp_pf__submenu');
        subMenu.setAttribute('data-left-visible', ecp_pf?.display_left ? 'true' : 'false');

        let innerHTML = '';
        subMenu.innerHTML = '';

        if (ecp_pf?.display_left) {
          const subMenuItems = ecp_pf?.items?.map((item) => {
            let line = '';

            line += `<div class="ecp_pf__submenu__nav__item">`;
            line += `<a class="ecp_pf__submenu__nav__link" href="${item.link.url}" target="${item.link.target}">`;
            line += `${item.svg}<span>${item.link.title}</span>`;
            line += `</a>`;
            line += `</div>`;

            return line;
          });

          innerHTML += `<p class="ecp_pf__submenu__title">${ecp_pf?.text}</p>`;
          innerHTML += `<p class="ecp_pf__submenu__description">${ecp_pf?.description}</p>`;
          innerHTML += `<nav class="ecp_pf__submenu__nav">${subMenuItems?.join('')}</nav>`;

          subMenu.innerHTML = innerHTML;
        } else {
          for (const group of ecp_pf?.groups) {
            innerHTML += '<li class="ecp_pf__submenu__group">';
            innerHTML += `<a href="#" class="ecp_pf__submenu__group__title">${group.title}</a>`;

            if (group.items) {
              innerHTML += '<ul class="ecp_pf__submenu__group__items">';

              for (const item of group.items) {
                innerHTML += '<li class="ecp_pf__submenu__group__item">';
                innerHTML += `<a href="${item.link.url}" target="${item.link.target}" class="ecp_pf__submenu__group__link">`;
                innerHTML += `${item.svg}<span class="ecp_pf__submenu__group__text">${item.link.title}</span>`;
                innerHTML += '</a>';
                innerHTML += '</li>';
              }

              innerHTML += '</ul>';
            }

            innerHTML += '</li>';

            subMenu.innerHTML = innerHTML;
          }
        }

        isInitialized.mobile = true;
      }

      insertDesktopCustomEcpPfSubMenu();
      replaceTabletCustomEcpOfSubMenu();

      window.addEventListener('ngenix/typeDeviceChange', () => {
        insertDesktopCustomEcpPfSubMenu();
        replaceTabletCustomEcpOfSubMenu();
      });
    })();

    (function () {
      const shell = document.querySelector('.main_menu__mobile__shell ');
      const groups = document.querySelectorAll('.ecp_pf__submenu__group');

      function onClickHandler(e, group) {
        const _self = e.target.closest('.ecp_pf__submenu__group');
        const items = e.target.closest('.ecp_pf__submenu__group__items');

        if (items) {
          return;
        }

        let hasVisible = false;

        for (const group of groups) {
          if (group.hasAttribute('data-visible')) {
            hasVisible = true;
          }

          if (group === _self) {
            continue;
          }

          group.removeAttribute('data-visible');
        }

        if (group.hasAttribute('data-visible')) {
          group.removeAttribute('data-visible');
        }
        else {
          // TODO: Не всегда срабатывает
          if (hasVisible) {
            shell.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
          }

          group.setAttribute('data-visible', 'true');
        }
      }

      for (const group of groups) {
        group.addEventListener('click', (e) => onClickHandler(e, group));
      }
    })();
